title: Yacht Rental in Marina Del Rey: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
Marina Del Rey, one of the world's largest man-made small craft harbours, offers a superb base for exploring the Southern California coast. Departing from Burton Chace Park, a half-day yacht charter Marina Del Rey typically costs between €600 and €1,500. BoatHire24 connects you with verified rental options in this vibrant waterfront community.

How much does it cost to rent a yacht in Marina Del Rey?

Prices range from €100 for a shared tour to over €5,000 for a fully crewed superyacht. The exact amount depends on the boat size, season, and duration. A small motorboat for two hours might cost €200, while a day on a 50-foot catamaran for up to 12 guests starts around €1,200. Peak season rates in July and August can be 20-30% higher than spring or autumn. For the best selection and transparent pricing, browse yacht charter Marina Del Rey listings on BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Marina Del Rey

Most rentals depart from the main harbour basins, with several public launch ramps and private marinas. Key departure points include Burton Chace Park, the main public pier; Marina Beach, adjacent to the harbour entrance; and the docks near Fisherman's Village. You can also set off from the marinas around the Marina del Rey Channel or from the nearby ports of Playa Vista and Venice Beach. For longer trips, the open Pacific offers routes to Santa Monica Bay and beyond.

Which boat to rent

Choose a boat based on your group size, activities, and budget. Here are the most popular options:

  1. Motorboat, ideal for a fast spin around the harbour, a 20-foot centre console seats up to 6 guests, from €250 half-day.
  2. Sailboat, perfect for a relaxing afternoon, a 35-foot Beneteau holds up to 8, from €400 half-day. See also the Mefasa 90 listing for a luxury motor option.
  3. Catamaran, stable and spacious, a 40-foot Lagoon accommodates 12 guests, from €800 full-day.
  4. Luxury motor yacht, for entertaining, a 60-foot Azimut or Sunseeker sleeps up to 12 on deck, from €1,500 full-day.
  5. Speedboat, such as the Olympic 490 shown above, a 16-foot runabout with a 150 hp engine, seats 4 guests, from €180 two-hour rental.

Costs and seasons

  • Shared sightseeing tour (1 hour): from €50 per person.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours, 6 pax): from €300.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours, 12 pax): from €1,200.
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day (8 hours, up to 12 pax): from €2,500.
Tip: book the morning departure in summer to avoid the afternoon sea breeze, which picks up around 2 p.m. and can make the harbour choppy.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marina Del Rey?

No licence is required for most rental boats under 26 feet and with reasonable horsepower. However, the operator will confirm your boating experience and may require a short briefing. For larger yachts, a captain is often included or a licence may be necessary. Check with your specific booking for exact requirements.

At a glance

  • Price band: €50, €5,000+
  • Peak season: June to August
  • Typical trip length: 2, 8 hours
  • Maximum guests: up to 12 on most boats
  • Currency: EUR (prices quoted by operators may be in USD; check before booking)

Questions about boat rental in Marina Del Rey

Can I rent a boat for a full day in Marina Del Rey?

Yes, many operators offer full-day rentals from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m., with prices starting at around €600 for a motorboat and €1,200 for a catamaran.

What is the best time of year for a yacht charter?

The best weather is from May to October, with July and August offering the warmest temperatures but also the highest demand. Spring and autumn provide calmer seas and fewer crowds.

Are there any hidden fees I should know about?

Some rentals may charge extra for fuel, crew gratuity, or security deposits. Always read the terms on BoatHire24 before confirming, and ask the operator for a full breakdown.

Can I anchor and swim near Marina Del Rey?

Yes, you can anchor in designated swimming areas within the harbour or head to the open ocean for a swim. Always follow local boating regulations and check for any restrictions in the channel.

BoatHire24 makes it straightforward to compare and book a boat for your day on the water. If you own a vessel in Marina Del Rey, you can also list your boat to reach thousands of potential renters worldwide. List your boat and start earning today.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marina Del Rey and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
